name: Navigation Subsystem
description: Provides position and attitude data to the mission computer

name: GPS Receiver
description: Acquires satellite signals and outputs position fixes

name: Command Processor
description: Parses and validates operator uplink messages

name: Acquire Satellite Signal
description: Searches for and locks onto GPS satellite signals

name: Output Position Fix
description: Formats and outputs timestamped position fix to navigation bus

name: Measure Inertial State
description: Measures angular rate and linear acceleration and packages sensor frame

name: Validate Command Message
description: Checks integrity and authentication of received operator uplink commands

name: Route Command
description: Routes validated commands to target subsystem handler

name: GPS Position Interface
description: Carries position fix and timestamp from GPS Receiver to Command Processor

name: IMU Telemetry Interface
description: Carries angular rate and acceleration from IMU to Command Processor

name: Operator Command Uplink
description: Encrypted operator command link from Ground Control Station to Command Processor

name: Navigation Internal Bus
description: Navigation subsystem data bus between Navigation and Command subsystems

name: Position Fix to Validate Function
description: Position fix data passed from Output Position Fix function to Validate Command Message function
